message:
Fix parseJson5Scalar for unary +, signed hex, and leading-dot numbers

parseJson5Scalar now uses Number() as fallback for JSON5-specific number
formats that JSON.parse rejects: +123, +.5, -.5, -0xFF, +0xFF.

Also added . (0x2E) to the JSON5 scalar start detection in ptScan and
spScan so leading-dot numbers like .5 are properly accumulated from
their first character instead of just the digit portion.
